name: Refrigerator Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the cucumbers and onions into a gallon jar.
2. Heat the remaining ingredients in a large pot until the sugar, salt, vinegar, tumeric, mustard seed, and celery seed dissolve completely.
3. Pour the hot mixture over the vegetables, ensuring they are fully covered. Store covered in the refrigerator.
4. Additional vegetables may be added at any time.
5. Keeps for 4 months.
